# Copilot Instructions — aiframework

> Make Claude Code understand your project instantly.

Stack: Rust (single binary, zero deps)

## Commands

- Build: `cd rust && cargo build --release`
- Test: `cd rust && cargo test`
- Lint: `cd rust && cargo clippy`

## Rules

- Never commit secrets or credentials
- Run `cargo test` and `cargo clippy` before committing
- All user-facing output goes through `rust/src/ui.rs`
- Generators never overwrite user-created files
- Tree-sitter for AST parsing, regex as fallback

## Key Files

- `rust/src/cli.rs` — CLI commands
- `rust/src/scanner/` — 13 repo scanners
- `rust/src/indexer/` — code indexer + 13 parsers
- `rust/src/generator/` — 14 file generators
- `rust/src/validator/` — 5 validation checks
